result.summary: Found several visual issues, primarily a blank header call-to-action, an overlay obscuring required fine print, and very small/low-contrast legal text near the bottom.

issues.description: The yellow button in the top-right header appears blank with no visible label or icon, so users cannot tell what action it performs.
issues.suggestion: Add clear visible text such as “Log In,” “Join Now,” or “Deposit,” and ensure the label has sufficient contrast against the yellow background.

issues.description: The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay sits on top of the fine print/legal copy near the bottom of the promo, making that text partially unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt higher, hide it once the user reaches this section, or reserve space so it does not overlap legal/disclaimer content.

issues.description: The fine print at the bottom is extremely small and difficult to read, especially on a mobile viewport.
issues.suggestion: Increase the legal text size and line height, and ensure it remains readable without zooming.

issues.description: Some fine print appears in dark blue over an orange/yellow gradient, which may have insufficient contrast in parts of the background.
issues.suggestion: Use a solid high-contrast background behind the legal copy or adjust the text color to improve readability.
